headline: Assessing DuPont (DD) Valuation After WAVE PRO Expansion Into Wider Water Treatment Markets
summary: DuPont de Nemours (DD) recently expanded its WAVE PRO water treatment modeling software to include reverse osmosis and nanofiltration, widening its use across drinking water, industrial utility systems, and seawater desalination projects. See our latest analysis for DuPont de Nemours. Despite the WAVE PRO update speaking to growing interest in advanced water treatment, DuPont de Nemours’ recent share price performance has cooled, with a 12.39% 1 month share price return decline following...
